scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web,super -c yellow,blue,magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @crestly/shared" "npm run dev -w @crestly/api" "npm run dev -w @crestly/web" "npm run dev -w @crestly/superadmin"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @crestly/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @crestly/web
scripts.dev:super: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @crestly/superadmin
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
